MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorneys, Scott Freeman and Mark Chernev of the law offices of Zacks Freedman & Patterson (415-956-8100) appear as counsels for plaintiffs, 1049 Market Street LLC

Deputy City Attorney, Kristen A. Jensen of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-4615) appears as counsel for third-party-in-interest, City and County of San Francisco

City introduces legal staff. Court and counsel confer regarding status of settlement negotiations. Both sides give status report. The City's draft settlement agreement, which is also hybrid transactional document is almost complete and is soon to be sent to owners for ratification. Fair amount of mechanical upgrades including ventilatio, fire sprinklers, bathroom accessibility need be done to bring property into code compliance. Cost is $1.6 Million. On new issue of new elevator configuration, both side's engineers should meet and coordinate as soon as possible. Next steps: 1. draft agreement to be presented by Monday, July 16. 2. City to finalize cost estimate as soon as possible. City is optimistic. New mayor enthusiastic and supportive of settlement.

Jury Trial and global settlement status hearing is CONTINUED to August 14, 2018 at 1:30 AM in Department 611.
